status: QUEUED — awaiting comprehensive civil cases from user before full grounding/categorization into the golden sets.
note: 60 real professor-formulated exam questions (2026-06-19 batch). Domain-tagged and given a likely_in_corpus flag, but NOT yet article-grounded or split into golden_queries_reasoning/constitutional. Pattern holds from the 19-question batch: a large share is out-of-corpus (EU law, legal philosophy, comparative/intl labor, Latin maxims). In-corpus clusters worth grounding first: administrative procedure (Ligji 05/L-031), contested procedure / LPK (03/L-006), labor (Ligji i Punës 03/L-212). User will also provide comprehensive CIVIL CASES to add.

domains_legend.labor: E drejta e punës / ILO — partly in corpus (Ligji i Punës 03/L-212), partly intl/comparative (out)
domains_legend.civil_procedure: LPK — Ligji për Procedurën Kontestimore 03/L-006 (in corpus); some Latin maxims are theory
domains_legend.admin_procedure: Ligji për Procedurën e Përgjithshme Administrative 05/L-031 (in corpus)
domains_legend.eu_law: EU institutions/treaties/history — NOT in a Kosovo corpus (out)
domains_legend.intl_social: Intl social/economic law, ILO conventions, ICESCR — mostly out; Kosovo pensions partly in
